name: her-estrogen
description: HerEstrogen marketing site. Static front-end (HTML + pre-compiled React) with two Vercel Serverless Function endpoints for OpenLoop webhooks (api/orders/*) + provider/pharmacy hooks (api/prescriptions/*). Intake and checkout are hosted by OpenLoop — this site is marketing-only.

scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:sleep && npm run build:hotflashes && npm run build:weightgain && npm run build:brainfog && npm run build:moodswings && npm run build:frozenshoulder && npm run build:skinandhair

comment_build: Bundles are built LOCALLY and committed (Vercel serves statically — no Vercel build step). After editing app.jsx or lp/sleep.jsx run `npm run build:all` and re-sync the GitHub Desktop mirror. esbuild --bundle follows ES module imports; shared.jsx is bundled into each output, not loaded at runtime.
